proposed_artifacts.content:
# Redaction Verification Audit

**Audited Artifact:** art-2c82d322be0b4c72924f80819d0b1d76 (Corrected Redacted Complaint Draft)
**Redaction Annotations:** art-fa947f5bb4ee4ea295ec6f94bc56003d
**Result:** No remaining defects found.

## Findings
- Full name replaced with '[Student]' as required.
- Matriculation number replaced with '[Matriculation Number]' as required.
- Bank transaction details replaced with '[Transaction details redacted]' as required.
- No direct identifiers remain in the redacted draft.

## Conclusion
The corrected redacted complaint draft complies with all specified redaction annotations. No further redaction actions are required.
